event: Contemporary wedding portrait of a couple in formal attire
description: A photographic diptych showing a man and woman in formal wedding attire. In the left panel, the woman in a turquoise blue floor-length dress stands beside the man in a black tuxedo with bow tie, both facing the camera against a bare concrete wall. In the right panel, the same couple appears: the man is now seated on a small white chair while the woman stands beside him with arms crossed. Their expressions are neutral and composed. The style is contemporary portrait photography with minimal staging.
